name: packet-hash-mismatch
description: A shape-valid envelope whose payload.hash does not match the packet bytes. Consumers MUST treat the mismatch as profile-verification failure on the re-verified instance (result.valid: false) while the envelope stays shape-valid and no record validity changes.

facts.reason: analysis session retiring; local successor continues the work

input.packet_material_utf8:
# Continuation packet: fixture

Session arc, corrections ledger, and remaining work with routing
tiers. Deterministic fixture body for the continuation-packet
profile; real packets carry operator context and stay private.
